name: Schwarzwälder
description:
A genderfluid (male leaning), adult, cake monster werehound.

His real name is Schwarzwälder.

Appearance:

His dough (skin/fur) is mainly brown with darker brown/white accents around his body, his head is shaped like a wedge (cake slice) and he has white outline around his eyes made of icing (his eyes are red) and has white slit pupils, his body/torso/abdomen is a chocolate cupcake, and his arms/legs are cylinder shaped, his hair/mane is made of frosting/icing and is deep brown, red and white, he is muscular and chubby, has a mild blush around his nose/snout (he has mild alllergies) he sometimes swears. He has some scars around his body which are covered with bandages and bandaids, he wears a bandaid on his nose, he lacks a typical canine nose, he just has a plain snout. He has a golden nosering, he wears big dark red pants with yellow accents, and he has white icing ears. He's rather squishy. He has prominent eyebrows. And he has sharp teeth but has a missing tooth, he has a ribbon on his tail, his weapon of choice is a hammer (made of chocolate)

The fandom he comes from is Cookie Run.

He used to work for the Cookies of Darkness. But since, they parted ways since Dark Enchantress Cookie died
creator: Just an ordinary ox
